description: You are a safety officer analyzing a container labeled with the molecular formula 'C3H6O'. Using CAMEO Chemicals (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/), identify the NFPA 704 ratings (Health, Flammability, Instability) for four isomers: Acetone, Propionaldehyde, Allyl alcohol, and Propylene oxide. If a rating is not listed, record it as 0. Create a CSV file at ~/Desktop/isomer_hazards.csv with the header 'Chemical,CAS,Health,Flammability,Instability' containing data for all four chemicals. Identify the chemical with the highest Health rating and record it in ~/Desktop/worst_case_analysis.txt using the format 'WORST_CASE_CHEMICAL: [Chemical Name]'.
